{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Navigator captain
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Darkness and Dawn (novel)|Of Darkness and Dawn]]
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]]'s target is a [[Navigator captain]] who has the [[Emperor's crown]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
